records.question: Which matches on 2011-04-28 had a win margin of at least 17.0 and featured a man of the match from India?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN player ON match.man_of_the_match = player.player_id
JOIN country ON player.country_name = country.country_id
JOIN country AS country__1 ON country.country_id = country__1.country_id
WHERE country.country_name = 'India' AND match.win_margin >= 17.0 AND match.match_date = '2011-04-28'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.Match_Id
FROM Match m
JOIN Player p ON m.Man_of_the_Match = p.Player_Id
JOIN Country c ON p.Country_Name = c.Country_Id
WHERE m.Match_Date = '2011-04-28'
AND m.Win_Margin >= 17.0
AND c.Country_Name = 'India'

records.question: What matches played at Wankhede Stadium since 2012 had a win margin of at least 6, with seasons where the man of the series scored at least 315, the purple cap was at least 190, and the orange cap was at least 162?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
WHERE season.man_of_the_series >= 315 AND season.purple_cap >= 190 AND season.orange_cap >= 162 AND season.season_year >= 2012 AND match.win_margin >= 6.0 AND venue.venue_name = 'Wankhede Stadium'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.Match_Id
FROM Match m
JOIN Venue v ON m.Venue_Id = v.Venue_Id
JOIN Season s ON m.Season_Id = s.Season_Id
JOIN Player p_mos ON s.Man_of_the_Series = p_mos.Player_Id
JOIN Player p_purple ON s.Purple_Cap = p_purple.Player_Id
JOIN Player p_orange ON s.Orange_Cap = p_orange.Player_Id
WHERE v.Venue_Name = 'Wankhede Stadium'
AND CAST(strftime('%Y', m.Match_Date) AS INTEGER) >= 2012
AND m.Win_Margin >= 6
AND (SELECT SUM(COALESCE(bs.Runs_Scored, 0)) + COALESCE(SUM(er.Extra_Runs), 0)
     FROM Ball_by_Ball bbb
     LEFT JOIN Batsman_Scored bs ON bbb.Match_Id = bs.Match_Id 
       AND bbb.Over_Id = bs.Over_Id 
       AND bbb.Ball_Id = bs.Ball_Id 
       AND bbb.Innings_No = bs.Innings_No
     LEFT JOIN Extra_Runs er ON bbb.Match_Id = er.Match_Id 
       AND bbb.Over_Id = er.Over_Id 
       AND bbb.Ball_Id = er.Ball_Id 
       AND bbb.Innings_No = er.Innings_No
     WHERE bbb.Striker = p_mos.Player_Id) >= 315
AND (SELECT SUM(COALESCE(bs.Runs_Scored, 0)) + COALESCE(SUM(er.Extra_Runs), 0)
     FROM Ball_by_Ball bbb
     LEFT JOIN Batsman_Scored bs ON bbb.Match_Id = bs.Match_Id 
       AND bbb.Over_Id = bs.Over_Id 
       AND bbb.Ball_Id = bs.Ball_Id 
       AND bbb.Innings_No = bs.Innings_No
     LEFT JOIN Extra_Runs er ON bbb.Match_Id = er.Match_Id 
       AND bbb.Over_Id = er.Over_Id 
       AND bbb.Ball_Id = er.Ball_Id 
       AND bbb.Innings_No = er.Innings_No
     WHERE bbb.Striker = p_purple.Player_Id) >= 190
AND (SELECT SUM(COALESCE(bs.Runs_Scored, 0)) + COALESCE(SUM(er.Extra_Runs), 0)
     FROM Ball_by_Ball bbb
     LEFT JOIN Batsman_Scored bs ON bbb.Match_Id = bs.Match_Id 
       AND bbb.Over_Id = bs.Over_Id 
       AND bbb.Ball_Id = bs.Ball_Id 
       AND bbb.Innings_No = bs.Innings_No
     LEFT JOIN Extra_Runs er ON bbb.Match_Id = er.Match_Id 
       AND bbb.Over_Id = er.Over_Id 
       AND bbb.Ball_Id = er.Ball_Id 
       AND bbb.Innings_No = er.Innings_No
     WHERE bbb.Striker = p_orange.Player_Id) >= 162

records.question: Which matches played on 2016-04-25 at Punjab Cricket Association IS Bindra Stadium had a win margin of at most 25, occurred in seasons up to 2016 with purple cap holders taking at least 299 wickets and orange cap holders scoring exactly 8?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
WHERE season.season_year <= 2016 AND match.win_margin <= 25.0 AND match.match_date = '2016-04-25' AND venue.venue_name = 'Punjab Cricket Association IS Bindra Stadium' AND season.purple_cap >= 299 AND season.orange_cap = 8
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.Match_Id
FROM Match m
JOIN Venue v ON m.Venue_Id = v.Venue_Id
JOIN City c ON v.City_Id = c.City_Id
JOIN Season s ON m.Season_Id = s.Season_Id
WHERE m.Match_Date = '2016-04-25'
  AND v.Venue_Name = 'Punjab Cricket Association IS Bindra Stadium'
  AND m.Win_Margin <= 25
  AND s.Season_Year <= 2016
  AND s.Purple_Cap IS NOT NULL
  AND s.Orange_Cap IS NOT NULL
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Wicket_Taken WHERE Player_Out = s.Purple_Cap) >= 299
  AND (SELECT SUM(COALESCE(bs.Runs_Scored, 0)) FROM Batsman_Scored bs 
       WHERE bs.Match_Id = m.Match_Id AND bs.Innings_No IN (1, 2)) = 8

JOIN Venue v ON m.Venue_Id = v.Venue_Id
JOIN Season s ON m.Season_Id = s.Season_Id
JOIN Player p ON s.Purple_Cap = p.Player_Id
WHERE v.Venue_Name = 'Punjab Cricket Association Stadium'
  AND m.Match_Date >= '2012-04-20'
  AND s.Man_of_the_Series = 315
  AND s.Season_Year >= 2012
  AND (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM Wicket_Taken wt
    WHERE wt.Player_Out = s.Purple_Cap
  ) >= 190
